document_title: TASK-122 — ENRICHMENT PROMPTS FOR GEMINI FLASH (Pure JSON Output)
instructions_for_developer: Copy this entire file into task-122-enrichment-prompts.json. These 10 prompts are optimized for Gemini Flash (<=3,000 token output). Each prompt produces ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no explanations. The enrichment script will JSON.stringify() the result and store it directly in the DB 'content' TEXT column. The React renderers will later do JSON.parse(resource.content).

mcp_servers.system: You are an expert Google Antigravity IDE content enricher. Enrich the given resource into a high-quality, interactive page that solves real 2026 developer pain (7-day lockouts, ghost consumption, credit issues, token-heavy MCPs). Output ONLY a single valid JSON object matching the schema below. No explanations, no markdown, no extra text. Use the injected taxonomy to make language native. tokenImpact is MANDATORY and must use real quota-crisis language (e.g. 'LOW: ~150 tokens, low lockout risk' or 'HIGH: one call can trigger 7-day Pro lockout').

full_prompt.user:
Resource to enrich:
Title: GitHub MCP
Description: Official GitHub integration for Antigravity
URL: https://github.com/antigravity/mcp-github

Relevant taxonomy to inject (use 2-3):
- Persona: Startup Founder / Indie Hacker (quota-sensitive)
- Pain: 7-Day Quota Lockout
- Workflow: Quota Workaround Workflow

Enrich exactly to this schema:
{"type":"object","properties":{"title":{"type":"string","minLength":10},"description":{"type":"string","minLength":120},"useCases":{"type":"array","minItems":3,"items":{"type":"string"}},"difficulty":{"type":"string","enum":["beginner","intermediate","advanced"]},"exampleCommand":{"type":"string"},"compatibility":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"copyButtonText":{"type":"string"},"tokenImpact":{"type":"string","description":"Exact token usage estimate, quota impact, and lockout risk (MUST reference real X complaints)"},"artifactsProduced":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"tags":{"type":"array","minItems":3,"items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["title","description","useCases","difficulty","exampleCommand","tokenImpact"]}

expected_valid_output.title: GitHub MCP Server for Antigravity
expected_valid_output.description: Official GitHub integration that lets your Antigravity agents read/write repos, create PRs, and manage issues without leaving the IDE. Critical during quota lockouts because it runs lightweight operations.
useCases: Pull latest code when quota resets
expected_valid_output.tokenImpact: LOW: ~150 tokens per initialization, low lockout risk — ideal for quota-crisis workflows

pm_notes.issue_1_identical_system_prompts: All 10 category system prompts are identical. This is acceptable for a first pass since {{schema}} injection differentiates behavior. However category-specific instructions would improve output quality (e.g. troubleshooting should say 'errorMessage must be the exact error text a developer would paste into Google'). Upgrade to v1.1 after first batch test.
pm_notes.issue_2_examplecommand_hallucination_ris: The worked example shows 'mcp install github' as exampleCommand. This may not be a real Antigravity command. The enrichment script must NOT trust Gemini Flash's generated exampleCommand for MCP Servers — it must use the existing resource URL or a pre-verified install pattern. Flag all exampleCommand fields for human review before publishing.
pm_notes.taxonomy_selection_logic: The {{taxonomy_inject}} placeholder requires the enrichment script to select 2-3 taxonomy entries per resource. Selection logic: (1) match persona based on resource category (enterprise MCPs → persona_enterprise_dev, etc.), (2) always include at least 1 quota pain point, (3) include the most relevant workflow. PM will spec this selection logic in TASK-122.
